/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libimgui_lib.a "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.obj" "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.obj"
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libimgui_lib.a
